title: Add dropout before classifier head
methodology: Added a single nn.Dropout(p=0.15) layer after the penultimate ReLU in the existing label-smoothed CNN. No other architecture, optimizer, data, or time-budget changes were made.
motivation: The live tiny-mnist brief on 2026-03-28 listed regularization as a promising unexplored direction, while prior keeps exp-019 (label smoothing) and exp-020 (linear warmup plus cosine) did not test dropout.
